creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Henning Matyschok from comment #6)

Moin moin 

Are you sure you are using a up-to-date git-checkout [1] to create the patch against? As again, your diff is still against an ancient version from 2019.



mfg Tobias

[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/net/vether-kmod/Makefile
